Vada Tavenner is the founder of Tidecraft Systems. Vada is exploring a pivot toward the enterprise segment.

---
title: Tidecraft Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Vada Tavenner.
---

Tidecraft Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Vada Tavenner. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Tidecraft Systems call with Vada Tavenner.
Vada said Tidecraft Systems hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
Vada prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
